description: The population health management team has completed a clinical risk stratification analysis identifying high-risk patients requiring urgent outreach. Using the risk stratification report at /home/ga/Documents/risk_stratification_report.txt, update each identified patient's record in LibreHealth EHR by adding the specified clinical risk problem to their medical problem list and scheduling the appropriate follow-up appointment. Login with admin / password.

metadata.industry: Population Health Management / Accountable Care Organization
